name: button
title: Button
description: An interactive element that triggers an action or navigation. Supports variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link), sizes (default, xs, sm, lg, icon variants), shapes (default, circle, square), and loading/disabled states.

cena.classificationRationale: Styled composition with CVA-based variant axes (zType, zSize, zShape, zFull, zLoading, zDisabled). Brain behavior is supplied by the native HTML <button> / <a> semantics + the host element's parent-tag check; no separate behavior primitive to install. Copy-and-parameterize is the right adoption shape.

preferenceLedgerRows.name: PL semantic class vocabulary
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: variant classes follow Tailwind utility shape; semantic aliases may be added in a Cena theme layer

preferenceLedgerRows.name: Angular 21.2.13 / zoneless API pin
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: uses input(), signal(), computed(), afterNextRender — all Angular 21 signal APIs

cena.ownership: @cena/catalog-ui owns these lines from 2026-05-28; upstream is the source of future starts, not a continuously-merged dependency
